# vitepress-plugin-color-preview

> Automatic color swatches for VitePress documentation. Detects CSS color values and Tailwind classes in markdown and renders inline previews with hover tooltips and click-to-copy.

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/vitepress-plugin-color-preview
- GitHub: https://github.com/KlangHaus/vitepress-plugin-color-preview

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/getting-started): Installation and configuration
- [Inline Colors](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/inline): Inline code color swatches
- [Code Blocks](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/code-blocks): Fenced code block swatches and CSS var() resolution
- [Color Palettes](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/palette): :::colors palette container
- [Color Strips](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/strip): :::colors-strip continuous color bars
- [Token Table](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/tokens): Token table with color, name, variable, purpose (click cells to copy)
- [Understanding Tokens](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/understanding-tokens): What design tokens are and how to document them
- [Token Comparison](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/compare): :::colors-compare side-by-side token variants
- [Contrast Checker](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/contrast): :::colors-contrast WCAG contrast ratio checker
- [Understanding Contrast](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/understanding-contrast): What AA, AA18, AAA and contrast ratios mean
- [Tailwind Classes](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/tailwind): Tailwind CSS class detection
- [API Reference](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/api): Exported functions and utilities
- [Full documentation](https://klanghaus.github.io/vitepress-plugin-color-preview/llms-full.txt): Complete docs in a single file
